description: DEV ONLY — never bundled into release. Grants the main window the same IPC permission sets as capabilities/default.json, but for the Vite/Next dev-server origin http://127.0.0.1:1420 (tauri.conf devUrl). This file lives OUTSIDE capabilities/ so Tauri never embeds it; it is injected at runtime under #[cfg(debug_assertions)] via app.add_capability() in src/lib.rs run() setup. Release artifacts trust only 1421/1422.
